title: Network guard: refuse cross-network key use
description: On startup, detect wallet network (testnet vs mainnet) from the address HRP stored in wallet DB. Refuse to start if --network flag contradicts wallet network. Display a clear error: 'This wallet was created for testnet. Use --network testnet or create a new mainnet wallet.' Prevents accidental mainnet tx with testnet wallet.
close_reason: --network flag on CLI; wallet.json stores network tag; check_network_guard() called on init/restore; error message names specific networks
